zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Conyers於大約1545年出生在英國達勒姆時，她的父親Cuthbert Conyers Esq.41歲，母親Mary Layton25歲。她和Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1580年在英國享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Conyers于大约1545年出生在英国達勒姆时，她的父亲Cuthbert Conyers Esq.41岁，母亲Mary Layton25岁。她和Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1580年在英国享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Conyers was born about 1545, in Durham, England, her father, Cuthbert Conyers Esq., was 41 and her mother, Mary Layton, was 25. She had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey. She died in 1580, in England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Conyers est née environ 1545, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Cuthbert Conyers Esq., avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary Layton, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey. Elle est décédée en 1580, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frances Conyers um 1545 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cuthbert Conyers Esq. 41 und ihre Mutter Mary Layton 25. Sie hatte mit Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1580 im Alter von 36 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Conyers è nata il circa 1545 nel Durham, England, sua padre, Cuthbert Conyers Esq., aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mary Layton, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey. Morì nel 1580, nel England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Conyersが約1545年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Cuthbert Conyers Esq.は41歳，母Mary Laytonは25歳であった。彼女はHenry Lawson of Nesham Abbeyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1580年にイギリスで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Conyers(이)가 대략 1545년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cuthbert Conyers Esq.(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Layton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1580년 영국에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Conyers nasceu aproximadamente 1545, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Cuthbert Conyers Esq., tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary Layton, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey. Ela faleceu em 1580, em Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Conyers родилась около 1545 г. в местности дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Cuthbert Conyers Esq. было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Layton, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey. Она умерла в 1580 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frances Conyers nació aproximadamente 1545, en Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Cuthbert Conyers Esq., tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mary Layton, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey. Murió en 1580, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
